type.description: The type of the factor to enroll.

totp_issuer.description: Your application or company name displayed in the user's authenticator app.

totp_user.description: The user's account name displayed in their authenticator app.

totp_secret.description: The Base32-encoded shared secret for TOTP factors. This can be provided when creating the auth factor, otherwise it will be generated. The algorithm used to derive TOTP codes is SHA-1, the code length is 6 digits, and the timestep is 30 seconds – the secret must be compatible with these parameters.
